Formerly: CMSC798E.

CMSC818 Advanced Topics in Computer Systems (1-3 Credits) Advanced topics selected by the faculty from the literature of computer systems to suit the interest and background of students.

Restriction: Permission of instructor.

Repeatable to: 99 credits.

CMSC828 Advanced Topics in Information Processing (1-3 Credits) Advanced topics selected by the faculty from the literature of information processing to suit the interest and background of students.
